style: Original blue soulfire crown-gate start menu panel bitmap texture. No SVG.

ontology.clause: ONTOLOGY ACTIVE: start menu frame must support a compact centered start action with DiabloStory's blue soulfire identity.

prompt: Create one vertical bitmap UI panel texture for an original dark fantasy ARPG start screen. Tall compact crown-gate frame, layered black stone, cold iron ribs, dark blue oxidized silver trim, fractured basalt, and a restrained sapphire soulfire crystal near the top center. Use blue flame seepage inside cracks and asymmetric crown-gate spikes so the design does not copy Diablo II menu panels. Leave empty dark center space for HTML buttons and Korean labels. No embedded text, no letters, no numbers, no characters, no icons, no inventory slots, no watermark. Avoid orange hellfire, brass-heavy Diablo clone framing, flat vector, SVG look, CSS gradient look, bright modern glass, cartoon style, beige parchment, clutter, or character portraits. Opaque PNG, production game UI material, not a screenshot.
acceptance: Panel is a dark fantasy bitmap texture suitable for overlaying HTML controls.
No text, icon, character, or watermark is embedded.
It feels like a blue soulfire DiabloStory crown-gate frame, not a direct Diablo copy.
